monitor.noTrainingHint: Start training to see Loss curves and parameters here

field.vae: VAE model file path (optional for SD/SDXL; required for Anima)
field.resume: Resume from a save_state checkpoint. Fill in the file path.
field.reg_data_dir: Regularization dataset path. Leave empty to skip regularization.
field.resolution: Training image resolution, width x height. Must be a multiple of 64.
field.enable_bucket: Enable ARB bucketing for non-square aspect ratios
field.bucket_no_upscale: Do not upscale images in buckets
field.bucket_reso_steps: Bucket resolution step size (SDXL can use 32)
field.save_state: Save training state for resuming later
field.save_last_n_epochs_state: Only keep last N epochs of training state
field.train_batch_size: Batch size. Higher = more VRAM usage.
field.min_snr_gamma: Minimum SNR gamma. Recommended: 5 if enabled.
field.weight_decay: Weight decay. Recommended 0.01~0.1. Leave empty to disable.
field.prodigy_d0: Prodigy optimizer d0 parameter (initial D estimate, leave empty for default)
field.optimizer_args_customHint: Format: weight_decay=0.01 betas=0.9,0.999. One key=value per line, passed as --optimizer_args
field.network_dim: Network dimension. Common range 4~128. Lower dim reduces VRAM.
field.network_alpha: Common values: equal to network_dim, or half, or 1.
field.network_weights: Resume from existing LoRA weights. Fill in the file path.
field.scale_weight_norms: Max norm regularization. Recommended: 1 if used.
field.base_weights: LoRA paths to merge into base model, one per line
field.base_weights_multiplier: LoRA weight multipliers, one per line
field.down_lr_weight: U-Net Encoder block LR weights (12 layers)
field.mid_lr_weight: U-Net Mid block LR weight (1 layer)
field.up_lr_weight: U-Net Decoder block LR weights (12 layers)
field.keep_tokens: Keep first N tokens unchanged when shuffling
field.caption_dropout_rate: Probability of dropping all tags for an image
field.caption_dropout_every_n_epochs: Drop all tags every N epochs
field.caption_tag_dropout_rate: Probability of randomly dropping individual tags
field.sample_prompts: Preview prompt. --n negative, --w width, --h height, --l CFG, --s steps, --d seed
field.mixed_precision: Training precision. RTX 30+ can use bf16.
field.cache_latents: Cache image latents to reduce VRAM
field.cache_text_encoder_outputs: Cache text encoder outputs. Disable shuffle_caption when using.
field.cache_text_encoder_outputs_to_disk: Cache text encoder outputs to disk
field.persistent_data_loader_workers: Keep data loader workers alive between epochs
field.ui_custom_params: Custom parameters in TOML format. Will override UI settings.
field.attn_mode: Attention implementation. torch=native; xformers=VRAM efficient; flash=fastest.
field.unsloth_offload_checkpointing: Use Unsloth async offload gradient checkpointing

common.backendDisconnectedHint: Backend service unavailable, check if it has exited

preset.title: Preset Management
preset.subtitle: Manage and apply training presets
preset.confirmDeleteMsg: This action cannot be undone. Delete preset
preset.name: Name

tagger.title: Tagger
tagger.subtitle: Auto-tag images using WD14 models
tagger.description: Backend powered by wd14-tagger. Built-in offline model included. Recommended threshold > 0.35.
tagger.imageDirDesc: Path to folder containing images to tag
tagger.modelDesc: WD14 series auto-tagging model. v3 is latest; large models are more accurate but slower.
tagger.thresholdDesc: Confidence threshold. Tags below this are discarded. Recommended: 0.35
tagger.characterThresholdDesc: Only effective for cl_tagger model. Recommended: 0.6
tagger.additionalTagsDesc: Extra tags to add, comma separated
tagger.excludeTagsDesc: Tags to exclude from results, comma separated
tagger.replaceUnderscoreDesc: Replace _ with space in tag names
tagger.recursiveDesc: Process images in subfolders as well
tagger.conflictActionDesc: What to do when a tag file already exists

tagEditor.title: Tag Editor
tagEditor.subtitle: Edit image tags and captions
tagEditor.noImages: No images found, please load a dataset directory first

settings.title: UI Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your training UI experience
settings.autoLoadHistoryDesc: Automatically restore last training parameters on startup

about.title: About

about.descriptionText: A modern web UI for Stable Diffusion LoRA / Dreambooth training.

environment.title: Environment
environment.subtitle: Manage and inspect the training runtime environment & acceleration libraries
environment.confirmAutoInstall: Auto-match best wheel from GitHub Releases and install?
environment.confirmUrlInstall: Install Flash Attention from this URL?
environment.noWheel: No matching wheel found. You can paste a URL manually.
environment.cachedDataHint: Auto-updates after first successful network connection.
environment.rateLimitHint: Will retry automatically later. You can also paste a wheel URL directly.
environment.manualUrlHint: You can paste a wheel URL to install directly.
environment.restartHint: Flash Attention is a C extension. After install, restart the GUI for changes to take effect.
environment.xfRestartHint: xformers is a compiled extension. After install, restart the GUI for changes to take effect.
environment.sectionCorePlaceholder: Coming soon — sd-scripts version, PyTorch, CUDA & environment info
environment.xfInstallInfo: pip install xformers, auto-matching the correct prebuilt wheel for your environment (supports pip mirrors).

opt.model_train_type_sdxl-lora: Stable Diffusion XL series LoRA training
opt.model_train_type_anima-lora: Diffusion Transformer (DiT) model derived from NVIDIA Cosmos-Predict2-2B
opt.save_model_as_safetensors: SafeTensors format, safe and fast to load, recommended
opt.save_precision_fp16: Half-precision float (16-bit), small file size, recommended
opt.save_precision_bf16: Brain Float 16, wider numeric range, suitable for training
opt.save_precision_float: Full-precision float (32-bit), largest file but highest precision
opt.lr_scheduler_cosine_with_restarts: Cosine annealing with periodic restarts, recommended for most training
opt.lr_scheduler_cosine: Cosine annealing, smoothly reduces learning rate
opt.optimizer_type_AdamW: Standard AdamW optimizer, higher VRAM usage
opt.optimizer_type_AdamW8bit: 8-bit AdamW, saves VRAM, recommended for general training
opt.optimizer_type_PagedAdamW8bit: Paged 8-bit AdamW, for tight VRAM scenarios
opt.optimizer_type_Lion: Lion optimizer (EvoLved Sign Momentum), fast convergence
opt.optimizer_type_Prodigy: Adaptive learning rate optimizer, auto-tunes LR, recommended for beginners
opt.optimizer_type_ProdigyPlus: ProdigyPlus + Schedule-Free, dual automation: no LR or scheduler tuning needed
opt.loss_type_default: Use the model's default loss function
opt.loss_type_l1: L1 Loss (MAE), more robust to outliers
opt.loss_type_l2: L2 Loss (MSE), more sensitive to large errors
opt.loss_type_huber: Huber Loss, combines advantages of L1 and L2
opt.loss_type_smooth_l1: Smooth L1 Loss, smoother near zero
opt.network_module_networks_lora: Standard LoRA network for SD/SDXL architectures
opt.network_module_networks_lora_anima: Anima LoRA network. Anima model is derived from NVIDIA Cosmos-Predict2-2B.
opt.network_module_lycoris_kohya: LyCORIS network, supports LoCon/LoHa and more algorithms
opt.sample_sampler_ddim: DDIM sampler, fast with stable output
opt.sample_sampler_euler_a: Euler Ancestral, fast sampler with randomness, recommended for previews
opt.mixed_precision_bf16: BFloat16 mixed precision, wide numeric range, recommended for BF16-capable GPUs
opt.mixed_precision_fp16: FP16 mixed precision, saves VRAM, compatible with older GPUs
opt.mixed_precision_no: No mixed precision (FP32), highest VRAM usage
opt.timestep_sampling_sigma: Sample timesteps based on noise sigma values
opt.timestep_sampling_sigmoid: Sigmoid distribution sampling, recommended for Anima training
opt.attn_mode_flash: Flash Attention, fastest but requires GPU support
